allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Remove-Item tmp/docx-verify -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Expand-Archive -Path tmp/test-fixed.zip -DestinationPath tmp/docx-verify -Force; Get-Content tmp/docx-verify/word/document.xml")

Bash(powershell -Command "Remove-Item tmp/final-verify -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Expand-Archive tmp/final-test.zip tmp/final-verify -Force; \(Get-ChildItem tmp/final-verify -Recurse -File\).Count")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(f'{k}: {v}'\) for k,v in sorted\(deps.items\(\)\) if any\(x in k for x in ['pdf','sharp','mammoth','docx','xlsx','tesseract','unpdf','pako']\)]")

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match "next" } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; "Stopped")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/tr/remove-bg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; if \($r.Content -match "BgEditor"\) { "BgEditor FOUND" } elseif \($r.Content -match "DropZone"\) { "DropZone FOUND" } elseif \($r.Content -match "ToolPage"\) { "OLD ToolPage FOUND" } else { "Neither found" }; if \($r.Content -match "interaktif|fırça|boyayın"\) { "New description FOUND" } else { "Old description or missing" })

PowerShell($chunk = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/_next/static/chunks/src_app_%5Blang%5D_\(tools\)_remove-bg_page_tsx_002dz0t._.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; if \($chunk.Content -match "BgEditor"\) { "BgEditor FOUND in JS" } else { "BgEditor NOT FOUND" }; if \($chunk.Content -match "ToolPage"\) { "ToolPage FOUND in JS \(OLD\)" } else { "ToolPage NOT in JS" }; if \($chunk.Content -match "DropZone"\) { "DropZone FOUND" } else { "DropZone NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($chunk = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/_next/static/chunks/src_1hpsks0._.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; if \($chunk.Content -match "BgEditor"\) { "BgEditor FOUND" } else { "BgEditor NOT FOUND" }; if \($chunk.Content -match "ToolPage"\) { "ToolPage FOUND \(OLD\)" } else { "ToolPage NOT FOUND" }; if \($chunk.Content -match "bg-editor"\) { "bg-editor ref FOUND" } else { "bg-editor ref NOT" }; if \($chunk.Content -match "paintToRemove|Paintbrush"\) { "Editor UI FOUND" } else { "Editor UI NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/tr/remove-bg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $allChunks = [regex]::Matches\($r.Content, 'src="\(/_next/static/[^"]+\\.js\)"'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value }; foreach \($url in $allChunks\) { $c = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$url" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($c.Content -match "BgEditor|Paintbrush|paintToRemove"\) { "FOUND in: $url"; break } }; "Search done")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/tr/remove-bg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; $allChunks = [regex]::Matches\($r.Content, 'src="\(/_next/static/[^"]+\\.js\)"'\) | ForEach-Object { $_.Groups[1].Value }; foreach \($url in $allChunks\) { $c = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$url" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; if \($c.Content -match "RemoveBgClient"\) { "RemoveBgClient in: $url"; if \($c.Content -match "useToolExecution|ToolPage"\) { "  -> USES OLD ToolPage!!" } elseif \($c.Content -match "BgEditor|bg-editor"\) { "  -> USES NEW BgEditor" } else { "  -> Unknown flow" } } }; "Done")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001/en/remove-bg" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; if \($r.Content -match "Paint over areas"\) { "NEW DESCRIPTION FOUND - new code is serving" } elseif \($r.Content -match "Remove white"\) { "OLD DESCRIPTION - old code" } else { "Unknown" }; if \($r.Content -match "Process"\) { "Has Process button \(OLD\)" } else { "No Process button" } } catch { "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
